products.title: Aura Smart Desk Lamp
products.description: Adjustable color temperature and brightness with app control and circadian rhythm sync.

products.title: PureAir Pro Gen 3
products.description: HEPA H13 filtration with real-time air quality monitoring and ultra-quiet night mode.

products.description: Wireless low-profile mechanical keyboard with multi-device pairing and white backlight.

products.description: Addressable RGBIC LEDs that sync with your screen or music for immersive experience.

products.title: Smart Humidifier Cloud
products.description: Ultrasonic cool mist humidifier with integrated essential oil diffuser.

products.title: ErgoStand Laptop Riser
products.description: Aluminum adjustable laptop stand to improve posture and cooling during work.

products.title: Sphere Smart Mood Lamp
products.description: Portable touch-sensitive lamp with 16 million colors and USB-C charging.

products.title: Noise-Cancelling Desk Pods
products.description: Wireless earbuds optimized for clear calls and deep focus in open offices.

products.title: Smart Air Quality Monitor
products.description: Tracks CO2, VOCs, humidity and temperature with historical data export.

products.title: Zenith Floor Lamp
products.description: Modern minimalist floor lamp with indirect lighting and smart home integration.

products.title: Universal Smart Hub
products.description: One device to control all your IR and Zigbee smart home gadgets via voice.

products.title: Bamboo Wireless Charger
products.description: Fast 15W wireless charging pad made from sustainable bamboo materials.

products.title: SleepWell Smart Diffuser
products.description: Timed aroma diffusion with white noise generator for better sleep cycles.

products.title: Monitor Light Bar
products.description: Screen-hanging light that eliminates glare and saves desk space.

products.title: Duo Smart Plugs (2-pack)
products.description: Control power consumption and schedule your non-smart appliances easily.
